name: worktree
description: Manage git worktrees — create, list, merge, and remove isolated branches.

action.description: Operation: 'new' creates a worktree, 'list' shows all, 'merge' squash-merges into base, 'rm' removes a worktree.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the git repository root.

branch.description: (new) Branch name for the new worktree.

base.description: (new) Base branch to create from. Defaults to 'main'.

name.description: (merge / rm) Name of the worktree to act on.

into.description: (merge) Target branch to merge into. Defaults to the worktree's base branch.

keep.description: (merge) Keep the worktree directory after merging.
